info.title: Epos Now API
info.description: Epos Now POS system API providing access to products, customers, transactions, bookings, staff, devices, categories, colors, brands, tax groups, and more. The API supports full CRUD operations with paginated list endpoints.

get.summary: List products
get.description: Returns a paginated list of products. Each page contains up to 200 items.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number, each page contains up to 200 items

get.summary: Get a single product by ID
get.description: Returns a single product.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of customers. Each page contains up to 200 items.

get.description: Returns a single customer.
